clauses.statement: The root package declares the exact Linux x64 GNU Rollup binary as an optional dependency.
The lockfile resolves the Linux x64 GNU Rollup binary as a concrete package entry.
The Linux native Rollup package remains optional and platform-constrained so incompatible platforms can skip it without changing VibePro runtime behavior.
Repository-relative docs links in PR release prose are projected as absolute GitHub links that pass the public manual dead-link gate.

diagrams.title: Linux CI dependency install
diagrams.mermaid:
flowchart LR
  Package[Root optional dependency] --> Lock[Resolved lockfile entry]
  Lock --> Install[npm ci on Linux]
  Install --> Rollup[Native Rollup binary]
  Rollup --> Docs[VitePress build]

diagrams.title: Release-note input boundary
diagrams.mermaid:
flowchart LR
  PR[Untrusted PR release prose] --> Normalize[Escape HTML and normalize docs links]
  Lock[Committed platform lock] --> CI[Linux npm ci]
  Normalize --> Manual[Generated public manual]
  CI --> Build[VitePress build]
  Manual --> Build
  Secrets[Deployment secrets] --> Deploy[Wrangler deploy]
  Build --> Deploy
